title: Domain pack card_templates.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-116 proved source_preferences.yaml drives research queue credibility priors. The creativity pack still has four other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that domain-pack files beyond the six already loaded are consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: card_templates.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer reads pack-defined card template metadata instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different template config changes export or validation behavior.
Golden GT11/GT12 and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
No public export/site changes beyond reading pack metadata in exporter.
non_goals: No loading all remaining pack files in one ticket.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No applying base_strength priors from evidence_types.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
rollback_plan: Revert card_templates loader wiring; restore inline exporter constants.
